headline: LPL Firm Specializing In Bank-Based Advisor Recruitment Attracts $725M JPMorgan Advisor
summary: Alan Feutz brings 25 years of experience serving high-net-worth clients and will move to Genesis Wealth to operate out of the firm’s newly opened branch on Chicago’s North Shore.

headline: Northern Trust (NTRS) Stock Faces Mixed Analyst Target Changes After Earnings Rework
summary: Northern Trust’s latest analyst update keeps the fair value estimate unchanged at US$171.0, even as Street price targets around the stock move in different directions. A cluster of recent target hikes and cuts, tied to refreshed analyst models, highlights how opinions split on where Northern Trust should trade after new research and earnings work their way through forecasts. In the sections that follow, you will see how these shifting targets fit into the broader story and how to track the...

headline: Is Northern Trust Stock Outperforming the Dow?
summary: Although Northern Trust has exceeded the Dow over the past 52 weeks, Wall Street analysts remain cautious about the stock's prospects.
